fields.name: client_id
fields.title: Client ID
fields.description: The client ID of your Amazon Ads API application

fields.name: client_secret
fields.title: Client Secret
fields.description: The client secret of your Amazon Ads API application

fields.name: refresh_token
fields.title: Refresh Token
fields.description: The refresh token obtained from the OAuth authorization flow

custom_description:
Amazon Ads is Amazon's advertising platform that enables sellers and vendors to promote their
products across Amazon's marketplace. This connector provides access to advertising profiles,
portfolios, Sponsored Products campaigns (including ad groups, keywords, product ads, targets,
and negative keywords/targets), and Sponsored Brands campaigns and ad groups for managing and
analyzing advertising campaigns across different marketplaces.
supported_questions:
- List all my advertising profiles across marketplaces
- Show me the profiles for my seller accounts
- What marketplaces do I have advertising profiles in?
- List all portfolios for one of my profiles
- Show me all sponsored product campaigns
- List all ad groups in my SP campaigns
- Show me all keywords in my sponsored product campaigns
- What product ads are currently running?
- Show me all targeting clauses for my campaigns
- List negative keywords across my ad groups
- Show me all sponsored brands campaigns
- List ad groups in my sponsored brands campaigns
- What campaigns are currently enabled?
- Find campaigns with a specific targeting type
- Which ad groups have the highest default bid?
- What keywords are using broad match type?
unsupported_questions:
- Create a new advertising campaign
- Update my campaign budget
- Delete an ad group
- Generate a performance report

parameters.name: profileTypeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter profiles by type. Comma-separated list of profile types.
Valid values: seller, vendor, agency

first_operation.description:
Returns a list of advertising profiles associated with the authenticated user.
Profiles represent an advertiser's account in a specific marketplace. Advertisers
may have a single profile if they advertise in only one marketplace, or a separate
profile for each marketplace if they advertise regionally or globally.

parameters.name: profileTypeFilter
parameters.description:
Filter profiles by type. Comma-separated list of profile types.
Valid values: seller, vendor, agency

profiles.description:
Returns a list of advertising profiles associated with the authenticated user.
Profiles represent an advertiser's account in a specific marketplace. Advertisers
may have a single profile if they advertise in only one marketplace, or a separate
profile for each marketplace if they advertise regionally or globally.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the profile

profiles.description:
Retrieves a single advertising profile by its ID. The profile contains
information about the advertiser's account in a specific marketplace.

parameters.name: includeExtendedDataFields

schema.description: Whether to include extended data fields in the response

parameters.description: Whether to include extended data fields in the response

portfolios.description:
Returns a list of portfolios for the specified profile. Portfolios are used to
group campaigns together for organizational and budget management purposes.

parameters.name: portfolioId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the portfolio

portfolios.description: Retrieves a single portfolio by its ID using the v2 API.

include.description: Comma-separated list of states to include (enabled, paused, archived)

parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination

sponsored_product_campaigns.description:
Returns a list of sponsored product campaigns for the specified profile.
Sponsored Products campaigns promote individual product listings on Amazon.

parameters.name: campaignId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the campaign

sponsored_product_campaigns.description: Retrieves a single sponsored product campaign by its ID using the v2 API.

include.description: Comma-separated list of states to include (enabled, paused, archived)

parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

sponsored_product_ad_groups.description:
Returns a list of sponsored product ad groups for the specified profile.
Ad groups are used to organize ads and targeting within a campaign.

include.description: Comma-separated list of states to include (enabled, paused, archived)

parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination

sponsored_product_keywords.description:
Returns a list of sponsored product keywords for the specified profile.
Keywords are used in manual targeting campaigns to match shopper search queries.

include.description: Comma-separated list of states to include (enabled, paused, archived)

parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination

sponsored_product_product_ads.description:
Returns a list of sponsored product ads for the specified profile.
Product ads associate an advertised product with an ad group.

include.description: Comma-separated list of states to include (enabled, paused, archived)

parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination

sponsored_product_targets.description:
Returns a list of sponsored product targeting clauses for the specified profile.
Targeting clauses define product or category targeting for ad groups.

include.description: Comma-separated list of states to include (enabled, paused, archived)

parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination

sponsored_product_negative_keywords.description:
Returns a list of sponsored product negative keywords for the specified profile.
Negative keywords prevent ads from showing for specific search terms.

include.description: Comma-separated list of states to include (enabled, paused, archived)

parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination

sponsored_product_negative_targets.description:
Returns a list of sponsored product negative targeting clauses for the specified profile.
Negative targeting clauses exclude specific products or categories from targeting.

include.description: Comma-separated list of states to include (enabled, paused, archived)

parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination

sponsored_brands_campaigns.description:
Returns a list of sponsored brands campaigns for the specified profile.
Sponsored Brands campaigns help drive discovery and sales with creative ad experiences.

include.description: Comma-separated list of states to include (enabled, paused, archived)

parameters.name: maxResults

schema.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Token for pagination

sponsored_brands_ad_groups.description:
Returns a list of sponsored brands ad groups for the specified profile.
Ad groups organize ads and targeting within a Sponsored Brands campaign.
